title: Debug assertion sqlite3VdbeExec: Assertion `memIsValid(pRec)' failed
poc: SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE (0, t0.c0) IN(SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER(), LAG(0) OVER() FROM t0);
key_bug_features: SELECT with DENSE_RANK() and LAG() triggers assertion error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 REAL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (DENSE_RANK() OVER(), LAG(c1) OVER()) IN (SELECT 1, NULL FROM t1);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (0, c2) IN (SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER(), LAG(c3) OVER() FROM t1);
